description: Create and publish a blog post titled 'The Future of Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare'. Assign the post to the 'Technology' category and include the following four tags: 'AI', 'healthcare', 'technology', and 'featured'. The post content must be at least 100 words discussing how AI is transforming healthcare and must incorporate these five keywords: 'artificial intelligence', 'healthcare', 'diagnostics', 'treatment', and 'patient care'.

metadata.expected_title: The Future of Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare
